sam-√edh Ā. -edhate, to prosper greatly, thrive, increase,  AV. ;  BhP.  :
Caus. -edhayati, to cause to prosper or succeed, make happy or fortunate, increase, swell, strengthen,  ĀśvGṛ. ;  MBh.  &c.

results.rendered_html:
samedh 1 A. To prosper greatly, thrive, increase.
— Caus.
1 To make happy or fortunate.
2 To feed, supply with, strengthen; sūryaḥ samedhayatbagnimagniḥ sūrbaṃ ca tejasā  V. 5. 20.
